filesModified.purpose: Added self-start class to external link button className to prevent full-width stretch inside flex-col parent
Added self-start class to external link button class attribute, kept in sync with TSX

testPage.notes: No test page changes required — this was a CSS-only fix

fixesApplied.description: Added self-start to btn-primary anchor in both TSX and PHP so the button sizes to its content width rather than stretching to fill the flex-col parent
